title: Is Musk Running an Illegal Power Plant? The D.O.J. Says It Might Weigh In.
description: In a court filing, the administration signaled support for Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence company in a lawsuit challenging xAI’s generators at a huge Mississippi data center.

title: Jack Antonoff Slams People Who Use AI to Make Music
description: Jack Antonoff slammed people who use AI, or artificial intelligence, to make music, calling them "Godless whores."
content:
The rise in AI-generated music has generated a lot of thoughts about the technology for Jack Antonoff.
